header.title: Signup Requests
header.subtitle: Review and manage incoming trial requests from the public signup form.

empty.heading: No signup requests
empty.subline: New requests from the public signup form will appear here.

approveModal.title: Approve Request
approveModal.successMessage: The tenant {{name}} has been created. Share the temporary password below — it will only be shown once.
approveModal.approveMessage: Approving {{name}} will create a new tenant and email credentials to {{email}}.

rejectModal.title: Reject Request
rejectModal.message: Rejecting {{name}} will permanently close this request. Please provide a reason.
rejectModal.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this request being rejected?
